from source import pascal

def test_pascal_missing_trailing_one():
    expected = [[1], [1, 1], [1, 2, 1]]
    result = pascal(3)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected rows of lengths [1, 2, 3] but got {result} with lengths {[len(row) for row in result]}"
